mapper.insert:
/* adm-item-itemrestbatch-sql-oracle.xml insertInterfaceItemList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_INTF_IC ( ICKEY , ICNAME , CONSUMER_ICNAME , CTGKEY , IC_TYPE , INTF_IC_TYPE , IC_BARCODE , UOM , INTF_UOM , SHELF , SHELFUNIT , COST , INTF_COST , COSTUNIT , CREAT_AT , MODIFY_AT , TEMPERING , INTF_TEMPERING , TEMPERINGTIME , SBKEY , ORGKEY , INVUNIT , WEIGHT , TOTWEIGHT , WEIGHTUNIT , SZ , LENGTH , WIDTH , HEIGHT , SPEC , VOLUME , VOLUMEUNIT , INTF_IC_STATUS , IC_STATUS , WGT_CF_YN , REQUESTDT , INTERFACE_ID , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY
) VALUES ( LTRIM(#{ickey}, '0') /*화주상품코드*/ , #{icname} /*제품명*/ , #{consumerIcname} /*소비자품명*/ , #{ctgkey} /*계층구조*/ , CASE #{icType} WHEN 'FERT' THEN '003' /*제품*/ WHEN 'HAWA' THEN '005' /*상품*/ WHEN 'S023' THEN '006' /*소모품*/ WHEN 'LEIH' THEN '3' /*용기*/ ELSE '1' /*일반상품*/ END /*제품 유형*/ , #{icType} /*제품 유형*/ , #{icBarcode} /*제품 바코드*/ , CASE #{invunit} WHEN #{boxexternuom} THEN #{boxuom} WHEN #{bolexternuom} THEN #{boluom} WHEN #{eaexternuom} THEN #{eauom} ELSE COALESCE(#{invunit}, #{boxuom}) END , #{invunit} , CASE WHEN #{shelfunit}='Y' THEN CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC) * 365 WHEN #{shelfunit}='M' AND MOD(CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC), 12)=0 THEN CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC)/12*365 WHEN #{shelfunit}='M' AND MOD(CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC), 12)>0 THEN CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC) * 31 WHEN #{shelfunit}='W' THEN CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC) * 7 WHEN #{shelfunit}='H' THEN TRUNC(CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC) / 24, 3) ELSE CAST(#{shelf} AS NUMERIC) END /*유통기한*/ , #{shelfunit} /*유통기한 단위*/ , CASE WHEN #{costunit}='Y' THEN CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC) * 365 WHEN #{costunit}='M' AND MOD(CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC), 12)=0 THEN CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC)/12*365 WHEN #{costunit}='M' AND MOD(CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC), 12)>0 THEN CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC) * 31 WHEN #{costunit}='W' THEN CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC) * 7 WHEN #{costunit}='H' THEN TRUNC(CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC) / 24, 3) ELSE CAST(#{cost} AS NUMERIC) END /*소비기한(일 단위로 변환)*/ , #{cost} , #{costunit} /*소비기한 단위*/ , #{creatAt} /*생성일자*/ , #{modifyAt} /*수정일자*/ , #{mappTempering} /*SAP-시스템 맵핑 Tempering*/ , #{tempering} /*Tempering*/ , #{temperingtime} /*Tempering시간*/ , #{sbkey} /*대체상품코드*/ , #{orgkey} /*원상품코드*/ , #{invunit} /*재고단위*/ , #{weight} /*순중량*/ , #{totweight} /*총중량*/ , #{weightunit} /*중량단위(KG)*/ , #{sz} /*크기*/ , #{length} /*세로*/ , #{width} /*가로*/ , #{height} /*높이*/ , #{spec} /*가로/세로/높이 단위*/ , #{volume} /*부피*/ , #{volumeunit} /*부피단위*/ , #{icStatus} /*품목상태*/ , #{mappIcStatus} /*SAP-시스템 맵핑 품목상태*/ , #{wgtCfYn} /*PDA 검근여부*/ , #{requestDt} /*요청일자*/ , #{interfaceId} /*인터페이스 마스터 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} /*수정 사용자 ID*/ )

/* adm-item-itemrestbatch-sql-oracle.xml insertInterfaceItemUnitList */ INSERT INTO TADMIN_INTF_ICUNIT ( ICKEY /*화주상품코드*/ , UOM /*단위*/ , INTF_UOM , NUMERATOR /*분자*/ , DENOMINATOR /*분모*/ , COVERTQTY /*환산수량*/ , QTY /*기본수량*/ , LENGTH /*길이*/ , WIDTH /*너비*/ , HEIGHT /*높이*/ , SIZEUNIT /*측정단위*/ , WEIGHT /*중량*/ , INTF_WEIGHT , WEIGHTUNIT /*중량단위*/ , INTF_WEIGHTUNIT , VOLUME /*부피*/ , INTF_VOLUME , VOLUMEUNIT /*부피단위*/ , INTF_VOLUMEUNIT , BARCODE /*바코드*/ , CONSUMER_PRICE /*소비자가*/ , OUT_PRICE /*출고가*/ , STOR_PRICE /*대리점가*/ , REQUESTDT /*요청일자*/ , INTERFACE_ID /*인터페이스 마스터 ID*/ , INSERTDATE /*입력 일시*/ , INSERTURKEY /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , UPDATEDATE /*수정 일시*/ , UPDATEURKEY /*수정 사용자 ID*/ ) VALUES ( LTRIM(#{ickey}, '0') /*화주상품코드*/ , CASE WHEN #{uom}=#{boxexternuom} THEN #{boxuom} WHEN #{uom}=#{bolexternuom} THEN #{boluom} WHEN #{uom}=#{eaexternuom} THEN #{eauom} ELSE #{uom} END /*단위*/ , #{uom} , #{numerator} /*분자*/ , #{denominator} /*분모*/ , CASE WHEN CAST(#{denominator} AS NUMERIC)=0 THEN 1 ELSE TRUNC(CAST(#{numerator} AS NUMERIC) / CAST(#{denominator} AS NUMERIC), 5) END /*환산수량*/ , #{qty} /*기본수량*/ , #{length} /*길이*/ , #{width} /*너비*/ , #{height} /*높이*/ , #{sizeunit} /*측정단위*/ , CASE WHEN #{weightunit}='KG' THEN CAST(#{weight} AS NUMERIC) * 1000 ELSE CAST(#{weight} AS NUMERIC) END /*중량*/ , #{weight} , 'G' /*중량단위*/ , #{weightunit} , CASE WHEN #{volumeunit}='MMQ' THEN CAST(#{volume} AS NUMERIC) ELSE COALESCE(#{length}, 0) * COALESCE(#{width}, 0) * COALESCE(#{height}, 0) END /*부피*/ , #{volume} , 'MM3' /*부피단위(mm*mm*mm)*/ , #{volumeunit} , #{barcode} /*바코드*/ , #{consumerPrice} /*소비자가*/ , #{outPrice} /*출고가*/ , #{storPrice} /*대리점가*/ , #{requestDt} /*요청일자*/ , #{interfaceId} /*인터페이스 마스터 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} /*입력 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} /*입력 사용자 ID*/ , #{interfaceDate} /*수정 일시*/ , #{interfaceUrkey} /*수정 사용자 ID*/ )
